summary: Etap did NOT block the Gemini request. StreamGenerate returned 200 OK via h2, and Gemini produced its own refusal response about personal information. No signaler-pa or channel/multi-watch requests observed in Network tab. The registered domain/path was not hit during this interaction.

StreamGenerate.note: Main Gemini API call succeeded normally

gemini_response_summary: Gemini returned its own safety refusal: refused to provide personal ID number, suggested general information about ID structure instead.
console_errors: CSP img-src violation (pre-existing), no Etap-related errors
